# Stock Packaging Qty

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:5b8f860ba729ede992476459b447110fc34c95d4543e9f17afe7f0489724975e

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

Add packaging fields in the stock moves, their lines and their reports.

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Known issues / Roadmap

- Since we store done product packaging quantities in the stock move lines, we
  should be able to use this information in quants to provide real
  packaging-based stock data.

## Bug Tracker

Bugs are tracked on [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/OCA/stock-logistics-warehouse/issues).
In case of trouble, please check there if your issue has already been reported.
If you spotted it first, help us to smash it by providing a detailed and welcomed
[feedback](https://github.com/OCA/stock-logistics-warehouse/issues/new?body=module:%20stock_move_packaging_qty%0Aversion:%2016.0%0A%0A**Steps%20to%20reproduce**%0A-%20...%0A%0A**Current%20behavior**%0A%0A**Expected%20behavior**).

methods.name: odoo.addons.stock_move_packaging_qty.models.stock_move.StockMove._compute_product_packaging_qty_done
documentation: Get the sum of done packaging qtys from move lines.

methods.name: odoo.addons.stock_move_packaging_qty.models.stock_move.StockMove._inverse_product_packaging_qty
documentation:
Store the quantity in the product's UoM.

This inverse is also an onchange because otherwise changes are not
reflected live.

methods.name: odoo.addons.stock_move_packaging_qty.models.stock_move.StockMove._inverse_product_packaging_qty_done
documentation: Store the done packaging dqty in the move line if there's just one.

methods.name: odoo.addons.stock_move_packaging_qty.models.stock_move.StockMove._onchange_product_packaging
documentation: Add a default qty if the packaging has an invalid value.

methods.name: odoo.addons.stock_move_packaging_qty.models.stock_move.StockMove._get_single_package_uom_qty
documentation: Return the quantity of a single package in the move's UoM.

methods.name: odoo.addons.stock_move_packaging_qty.models.stock_move.StockMove._set_quantities_to_reservation
documentation: Add packaging qtys when clicking on "Set Quantities".

methods.name: odoo.addons.stock_move_packaging_qty.models.stock_move.StockMove._clear_quantities_to_zero
documentation: Clear packaging qtys when clicking on "Clear Quantities".

methods.name: odoo.addons.stock_move_packaging_qty.models.stock_move.StockMove._action_assign
documentation: Set the packaging qty reserved when assigning.

functions.name: odoo.addons.stock_move_packaging_qty.migrations.15.0.0.pre-migrate.migrate
documentation:
Use upstream column.

In https://github.com/odoo/odoo/pull/68654, upstream added product_packaging_id.
That feature is removed from this module and migrated there.

methods.name: odoo.addons.stock_move_packaging_qty.tests.test_stock_move_packaging_qty.TestStockMovePackagingQty.test_product_packaging_qty_reserved
documentation: Test that the product packaging quantity reserved is correctly set.
